name: voidauth
description: Single Sign-On for Your Self-Hosted Universe
readme_summary: VoidAuth is an open-source Single Sign-On (SSO) solution designed for self-hosted applications. It acts as a central authentication provider using OpenID Connect (OIDC) and Proxy ForwardAuth, simplifying user management and enhancing security for a personal digital universe.
key_features: Multi-factor Authentication, Passkeys, and Passkey-Only Accounts
Secure Password Reset with Email Verification
Encryption-At-Rest with Postgres or SQLite Database
primary_use_case: To provide a centralized, secure, and user-friendly Single Sign-On (SSO) solution for managing access to multiple self-hosted applications.
cover_image_prompt: A majestic, ornate keyhole acting as a central gateway to a vibrant, interconnected digital city. A single, glowing master key, labeled 'VoidAuth', is being inserted into the keyhole. As the key turns, various stylized buildings representing self-hosted applications (e.g., a cloud server icon, a database icon, a code editor icon) light up and unlock, emitting soft, welcoming light. Subtle digital particles and faint code snippets float around the scene, hinting at the underlying technology. The overall mood is secure, organized, and empowering. 3D isometric illustration style with a clean, modern aesthetic and a color palette of deep blues, purples, and glowing golds.

name: lodestone
description: A free, open source server hosting tool for Minecraft and other multiplayer games
readme_summary: Lodestone is a free, open-source server hosting tool for Minecraft and other multiplayer games, built with Rust, React, and TypeScript. It offers a user-friendly interface for easy setup, real-time status monitoring, file management, and collaborative server administration, with a focus on security and extensibility.
key_features: File manager (unzip, upload, download, copy, paste)
Collaborative remote server and resource management
primary_use_case: Simplifying the setup and management of multiplayer game servers, particularly Minecraft, through an accessible graphical interface.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, anthropomorphic robot meticulously organizing and tending to a vibrant, miniature cityscape representing game servers. The robot is shown connecting different buildings with glowing data streams, while a large, clear monitor beside it displays real-time status indicators like 'online', 'players', and 'CPU usage'. Small, stylized icons representing file uploads, security shields, and user permissions float around the scene. The overall mood is helpful and efficient, with a clean, modern aesthetic. The image should be a 3D isometric illustration with bright, inviting colors and subtle digital particle effects, clearly conveying ease of use and comprehensive server control.
